AFFECT [[1658694193319203921]]
    IMPORT [[7081846004279]] [[180927.180926]]
    TRAVERSE [[6502786168]]
        LOCATE AFTER ALL
        INSERT {
	property ~&7712198086779994&~ ingatellentSettings : ingatellentSettings

            ~&7712198086779994&~ {
	    	~&5972374&~: ingatellentSettings
                ~&7712874798136519&~: "ingatellentConfiguration"

		    ~{ingatellentConfigProperties}~

            }
        }
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
